title: Chaosium
description: This mod is a new adventure for the player who will be able to face bigger enemy capable of killing them in a snap, this mod allows you to get new item, armor and block. Once well equipped and prepared the player can go to challenge the bosses
body:
This second mod created by Phax709 aims to challenge players in an entirely new dimension called Chaos (Chaosium), featuring powerful creatures, unique blocks, and much more.

– Pyronis: a fiery ore that can defend you with flames and protect you through its armor.
– Melanterite: an ore difficult to distinguish due to its color being close to Minecraft’s lapis lazuli.
– Lazurite: allows you to create the portal to the new dimension.
– Various creatures, each more powerful than the last.
– Armors capable of withstanding any creature’s attack.
